metadata.document_name: RSI Divergence Trading System with Market Structure Confirmation
metadata.purpose: RAG knowledge base for automated trading alerts

timeframe_mappings.description: Higher timeframe divergence requires lower timeframe market structure confirmation

core_concept.definition: When price moves in a certain direction, the RSI oscillator should move in the same direction. When they don't follow a similar path, this is called Divergence.
core_concept.cause: Occurs because the average change in the lookback period is in a different direction compared to price
core_concept.usage: Find potential reversals on larger timeframes or swing/scalp opportunities on lower timeframes
core_concept.reliability: Very reliable, but adding price movement confirmations leads to more profitable setups

bullish_divergence.description: Formed when downtrend price move is going to reverse. The LOWS of price and oscillator are not in sync.
bullish_divergence.rule: ALWAYS LOOK AT THE LOWS of the oscillator and the price

strong_bullish.name: Strong Bullish Divergence
strong_bullish.interpretation: Although price is decreasing, the overall average rate of change is increasing. Sellers are not selling at the same momentum.

medium_bullish.name: Medium Bullish Divergence
medium_bullish.price_action: Price makes a DOUBLE BOTTOM (same level as earlier low)
medium_bullish.interpretation: At the same price levels, the momentum is increasing.

weak_bullish.name: Weak Bullish Divergence
weak_bullish.rsi_action: RSI makes a DOUBLE BOTTOM (same level)
weak_bullish.interpretation: Even though price is decreasing, the momentum is intact.

hidden_bullish.name: Hidden Bullish Divergence
hidden_bullish.interpretation: Continuation signal in uptrend. Price holding up despite momentum dip.

bearish_divergence.description: Used to find the tops. Look at the HIGHS only.
bearish_divergence.rule: ALWAYS LOOK AT THE HIGHS of the oscillator and the price
bearish_divergence.note: Only look at the value of the BODY of the candle, not the wicks

strong_bearish.name: Strong Bearish Divergence
strong_bearish.interpretation: Even though price is moving higher, the average momentum of the look-back period is decreasing. Potential top signal.

medium_bearish.name: Medium Bearish Divergence
medium_bearish.price_action: Price makes a DOUBLE TOP (same price level)
medium_bearish.interpretation: At the same price level, the momentum has decreased.

weak_bearish.name: Weak Bearish Divergence
weak_bearish.rsi_action: RSI makes a DOUBLE TOP (same level)
weak_bearish.interpretation: The average momentum isn't ready to go up even as the price goes up.

hidden_bearish.name: Hidden Bearish Divergence
hidden_bearish.interpretation: Price is going down even after there's an increase in the average momentum. Continuation of downtrend.

important_tips: Don't look for divergences in a non-trending market
There must be clear new levels formed: HH, HL or LH, LL
Divergences are very reliable, adding further price movement confirmations leads to more profitable setup
Only the closing value is chosen for studying divergences since the source for RSI is the closing value
May fail rarely, so accompany entry with further confirmations

bullish_ms.definition: Price makes a series of Higher Highs (HH) and Higher Lows (HL)
bullish_ms.bos_trigger: Every time price takes out a high to form a higher high

bearish_ms.definition: Price makes a series of Lower Lows (LL) and Lower Highs (LH)
bearish_ms.bos_trigger: Every time price takes out a low to form a lower low

swing_structure.definition: Framework where we lay out deep swing highs and lows - significant price fluctuations (Bigger picture)
swing_structure.deep_swing_high: The highest point that causes the swing low
swing_structure.deep_swing_low: The lowest point that causes a swing high
swing_structure.note: Not every swing low is significant unless it takes out a previous swing high (bullish MS)

substructure.definition: Minor movements happening inside the larger swing structure (Smaller picture)
substructure.usage: BOS happens in swing structures while CHoCH happens in Substructures

choch.definition: Change of Character - First sign of trend change in minor movements

bullish_choch.description: First switch turning substructure from bearish to bullish
bullish_choch.signal: Pullback might be over, uptrend is starting
bullish_choch.trigger: First green candle closing above the bullish CHoCH level

bearish_choch.description: First switch turning substructure from bullish to bearish
bearish_choch.signal: Uptrend might be over, pullback is starting
bearish_choch.trigger: First red candle closing below the bearish CHoCH level

choch.warning: CHoCH is not a guarantee, it can give false signals, use it in confluence with other tools

bos.definition: Break of Structure - Confirmation of trend change
bos.requirement: Look for deep swing highs and lows being taken out
bos.note: After every BOS, expect a pullback on that same timeframe

trade_confirmation_rules.description: How to confirm divergence signals with market structure

step1.name: Detect Bullish Divergence
step1.action: Identify bullish divergence on signal timeframe
step1.check: Price makes LL or double bottom while RSI makes HL or double bottom

step2.name: Check Confirmation Timeframe MS
step2.action: Switch to confirmation timeframe and check market structure
required_conditions: Bearish CHoCH has occurred (first sign pullback starting)
Followed by Bullish CHoCH (first sign pullback ending)
OR Break of Structure (BOS) to the upside

step3.name: Entry Trigger
step3.action: Enter on first candle closing above bullish CHoCH level

step1.name: Detect Bearish Divergence
step1.action: Identify bearish divergence on signal timeframe
step1.check: Price makes HH or double top while RSI makes LH or double top

step2.name: Check Confirmation Timeframe MS
step2.action: Switch to confirmation timeframe and check market structure
required_conditions: Bullish CHoCH has occurred (first sign upswing ending)
Followed by Bearish CHoCH (first sign downtrend starting)
OR Break of Structure (BOS) to the downside

step3.name: Entry Trigger
step3.action: Enter on first candle closing below bearish CHoCH level

supply_absorption_candle.description: Large bullish candle that absorbs selling pressure

demand_absorption_candle.description: Large bearish candle that absorbs buying pressure

bullish_engulfing.description: Green candle completely engulfs previous red candle

bearish_engulfing.description: Red candle completely engulfs previous green candle

doji_in_trend.description: Doji candle appearing in a trend
doji_in_trend.signal: Indecision, potential reversal when combined with divergence

bullish_kicker.description: Gap up open above previous candle's body

long_tail_wick.description: Candle with long lower wick (bullish) or upper wick (bearish)

support_resistance_break.description: Exit when price breaks key S/R level against position

channel_break.description: Exit when price breaks out of channel in direction of trade

ema_support_break.description: Exit when price closes beyond EMA 200 against position

swing_target.description: Exit at previous swing high (for longs) or swing low (for shorts)

position_management.initial_entry: Enter on confirmed CHoCH/BOS with stop loss at recent swing point
position_management.add_to_position: Add on successful retest of breakout level
position_management.scale_out: Take partial profits at first target, trail stop on remainder

risk_warnings: Divergences may fail - always use stop losses
CHoCH is not a guarantee of trend change
Don't force divergences where they don't exist
Non-trending markets produce unreliable divergence signals
Volume confirmation adds reliability to signals

conditions: Find two swing lows in price within lookback period
Find corresponding RSI values at those swing lows
Strong: price_low2 < price_low1 AND rsi_low2 > rsi_low1
Medium: abs(price_low2 - price_low1) < tolerance AND rsi_low2 > rsi_low1
Weak: price_low2 < price_low1 AND abs(rsi_low2 - rsi_low1) < rsi_tolerance
Find two swing highs in price within lookback period
Find corresponding RSI values at those swing highs
Strong: price_high2 > price_high1 AND rsi_high2 < rsi_high1
Medium: abs(price_high2 - price_high1) < tolerance AND rsi_high2 < rsi_high1
Weak: price_high2 > price_high1 AND abs(rsi_high2 - rsi_high1) < rsi_tolerance

ms_change_detection.bullish_choch: Price breaks above recent swing high in downtrend substructure
ms_change_detection.bearish_choch: Price breaks below recent swing low in uptrend substructure
ms_change_detection.bullish_bos: Price closes above deep swing high with confirmation candle
ms_change_detection.bearish_bos: Price closes below deep swing low with confirmation candle
